title: Axon
description: A Block Game Optimization modpack with some extra features!
body:
## Axon


Axon is a semi-vanilla Minecraft modpack that includes some optimization mods, along with a extra mods that don't change major parts of the game. We recommend using it if you have a Mac and have trouble with other optimization modpacks. It also works well on Linux, but it has not been tested on Windows because we do not have access to a Windows computer at the moment. *We do not recommend joining larger servers with this modpack enabled as they may ban something like Zoomify or Xaero's Minimap*

- **[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium), [Exordium](https://modrinth.com/mod/exordium), [EntityCulling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling), [C2ME](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric)**: Increase the performance of the game greatly, especially on lower end hardware.

- **[LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights)**: Adds Optifine-like dynamic lighting to any glowing item in your hand.

- **[Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) + [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options)**: These add a plethora of features to sodium, such as the ability to enable more FPS info and show coordinates.

- **[No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports)**: Removes message signing on servers that have it enabled, preventing chat reporting.

- **[Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify)**: Fixes almost 100 bugs listed in Minecraft's bug tracker. (this is genuinely amazing for Mac users) 

- **[Auth Me](https://modrinth.com/mod/auth-me)**: Allows you to (re-)authenticate your account when needed instead of having to close your Minecraft instance.

- **[Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)**: Allows you to enhance the game's graphics with shader packs on a capable computer.

- **[Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify)**: Adds another Optifine feature, the zoom button (Replaces Ok Zoomer which replaced Zoomify)

- **[Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)**: Adds a fully featured minimap to the game.

- **[Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)**: Adds a fully featured world map to the game.

- Smaller mods and APIs: [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium), [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config), [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3), [Server Pack Unlocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/server-pack-unlocker), [AntiGhost](https://modrinth.com/mod/antighost)

### <ins>Disclaimer:</ins>
None of this code is mine, but if you have an issue with something in the modpack you can submit it on GitHub, email me at **maxeatedcheese@pm.me** or report the bug to the specific mod's developers if you know which mod caused the issue.
